name: golang-github-jackc-pgtype-dev
title: golang-github-jackc-pgtype-dev
summary: Go types for over 70 PostgreSQL types
description:
Go types for over 70 PostgreSQL types
pgtype implements Go types for over 70 PostgreSQL types. pgtype is the type
system underlying the (https://github.com/jackc/pgx) PostgreSQL driver. These
types support the binary format for enhanced performance with pgx. They also
support the database/sql Scan and Value interfaces and can be used with
(https://github.com/lib/pq).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgtype-dev because Go types for over 70 PostgreSQL types.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgtype-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgtype-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgtype-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
